headline: How The Helia Group (ASX:HLI) Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Turn More Cautious On Valuation
summary: Helia Group's latest analyst update keeps the modelled fair value steady at A$4.27, while trimming the price target by A$0.04 as part of a more cautious reset. That small move ties back to commentary that focuses on a slightly higher discount rate and updated risk assumptions, rather than a shift in the core business outlook. Read on to see what this evolving narrative could mean for your view on Helia Group over the coming months. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story...

headline: Goldman Sachs Taps SpaceX Collateral And QIA Ties For Fee Growth

These moves come as global investors look for tailored liquidity around private tech holdings and resilient channels for cross border capital deployment. For you as an...

headline: Morgan Stanley Says Earnings Shield S&P 500 From War
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Accelerating earnings are protecting the S&P 500 from deeper losses and masking a broader pullback in US equities, according to strategists at Morgan Stanley.The team led by Michael Wilson points to resilient earnings and continued economic recovery as reasons the S&P 500 has fallen less than 10% since hitting a record high in January. Beneath the surface, they see evidence that stocks are in the “final phase” of a correction.There are better gauges to assess the US stocks retreat

headline: Had You Invested $1,000 in Goldman Sachs 10 Years Ago, Here’s What You’d Have Now
summary: Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) reported Q1 2026 EPS of $17.55 versus a FactSet estimate of $16.47, with revenue of $17.23 billion, up 14%, against a $16.99 billion estimate. Net earnings rose 18% to $5.63 billion, EPS climbed 24%, equity trading revenue rose 27%, and investment banking fees rose 48%. Yet the stock fell approximately 4% ... headline: Goldman Sachs Earnings Climb 19% as Bankers, Stock Traders Notch Wins. Stock Tumbles.
summary: Goldman Sachs  ’ quarterly earnings jumped 19% from a year ago on robust investment-banking fees and record revenue from equities traders as the firm capitalized on a rocky stretch for the stock market.  The New York-based firm booked first-quarter net earnings of $5.63 billion, or $17.55 a share.  Net revenue was $17.23 billion.

content.title: Goldman Sachs Earnings Climb 19% as Bankers, Stock Traders Notch Wins. Stock Tumbles.

The New York-based firm booked first-quarter net earnings of $5.63 billion, or $17.55 a share.  Net revenue was $17.23 billion.

headline: Morgan Stanley Says Earnings Shield S&P 500 From Iran War
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Accelerating earnings are protecting the S&P 500 from deeper losses and masking a broader pullback in US equities, according to strategists at Morgan Stanley.The team led by Michael Wilson points to resilient earnings and continued economic recovery as reasons the S&P 500 has fallen less than 10% since hitting a record high in January. Beneath the surface, they see evidence that stocks are in the “final phase” of a correction.There are better gauges to assess the US stocks retreat

headline: Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) Surprises With Q1 CY2026 Sales
summary: Global investment bank Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 14.4% year on year to $17.23 billion. Its GAAP profit of $17.55 per share was 7.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Goldman Sachs Rakes in Investment Banking Fees
